CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-27-2017 Continued To Jan-17-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Nov-13-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANTS MANIFOLD PARTNERS, LLC, DONALD PUTNAM and GRAIL PARTNERS, LLC'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE the default entered against them on September 8, 2017 is GRANTED. Defendants have shown that they are entitled to have the defaults set aside per the discretionary relief provisions of CCP 473(b) based on mistake, surprise and excusable neglect. Granting this motion comports with California's strong policy of deciding cases on their merits and plaintiff Lorraine Lin has not shown that she would suffer any legal prejudice by the granting of the motion. Ms. Lin's request for an award of fees is denied. Ms. Lin should never have taken the defaults and should have stipulated to their being set aside. Defendants have until November 30, 2017 to respond to the complaint. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Reyes F. Hunter, CSR No. 6576, e-mail: rhunter@sftc.org. (L&M302)
